ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of the region (e.g., prefecture, city) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the regional health department */,
  "npatients" INTEGER /* Total number of patients */,
  "ncurrentpatients" INTEGER /* Number of current patients */,
  "nexits" INTEGER /* Number of patients who have exited (recovered or discharged) */,
  "ndeaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "ntests" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "src_url" TEXT /* URL to the source data */,
  "url_opendata" TEXT /* URL to the open data platform for verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the data source belongs to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., API, File) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
column_names: Type of the region (e.g., prefecture, city)
Contact information for the regional health department
Number of patients who have exited (recovered or discharged)
URL to the open data platform for verification
Unique identifier for each data source
Reference to the region the data source belongs to
Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON)
Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, hourly)
Contact person for the data source
Score indicating the quality of the data source
API key for accessing the data source (if applicable)
